creator: ross@rosstimson.com
text:
I encountered this before taking over maintenance of the port.  After
speaking with the notmuch devs / upstream they said that for some strange
reason the old headers were being picked up during the build.

In order to fix this simply remove the old version and then build the port
again.  It is not ideal but but it works for now.


On Sun, Dec 16, 2012 at 11:56 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/notmuch,
>
> Please note that PR ports/174487 has just been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:

> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
